title: Tangy Dense Light Moroccan Petit Pois Stir-fry
description: A tangy and dense light Moroccan-inspired dish featuring steamed petit pois that is both flavorful and low in carbohydrates.

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp lemon juice
ingredients.notes: ensure it is fresh, not bottled

ingredients.name: Salt to taste
ingredients.notes: adjust based on the natural sweetness of the petit pois

instructions: Steam the petits pois until just tender, about 5 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix together lemon juice, cumin, turmeric, and cinnamon (if using).
Drizzle the mixture over the steamed petits pois and toss well to coat evenly.
Season with salt as needed. Serve immediately while warm.
